name: AWS
description: Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the global market leader in cloud infrastructure, offering the widest range of over 250 services. It is ideal for large-scale, customized enterprise workloads and complex networking architectures.
pricing_notes: Pay-as-you-go, Reserved Instances (up to 72% discount), Savings Plans (flexible compute discounts), and Spot Instances (up to 90% discount). Advanced discount tools but requires active cost optimization (FinOps).

name: Azure
description: Microsoft Azure is a powerful enterprise-focused cloud platform with a massive global footprint. It excels in hybrid cloud deployments, Microsoft software ecosystem integration (Windows Server, SQL Server, Active Directory), and regulatory compliance.
pricing_notes: Pay-as-you-go, Reserved VM Instances (up to 65% discount), and Spot VMs (up to 80% discount). Azure Hybrid Benefit significantly reduces Windows & SQL licensing costs. Best ROI for enterprises with existing Microsoft agreements.
strengths: Strong hybrid cloud (Azure Arc, Azure Stack HCI)
100+ compliance certifications, excellent for regulated industries
65+ regions globally, strong presence in restricted markets

name: GCP
description: Google Cloud Platform (GCP) is a developer-friendly cloud environment focused on cloud-native scalability. It is the industry benchmark for artificial intelligence, machine learning (Vertex AI, TPUs), data engineering (BigQuery), and containerization (GKE).
pricing_notes: Pay-as-you-go, Committed Use Discounts (up to 70%), and Preemptible VMs (up to 80% discount). Automatic Sustained Use Discounts applied automatically without long-term commitment. Predictable pricing model.
strengths: Best for ML/AI workloads (Vertex AI, TPUs)
Competitive pricing with automatic Sustained Use Discounts
